headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk over medium term if ESG lag persists — Adani Ports and Adani Green's moderate NSE ESG ratings signal sector benchmarking pressure for Adani Power
what_matters: Possible P/E compression if ESG funds rebalance away, but no current margin erosion or revenue at risk.
BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, ESRS frameworks triggered; no immediate penalty but increased scrutiny.
Potential for marginal cost of capital increase (+20-40bps) if ESG scores lag, but no immediate bond spread impact.
